name: Hypno-Cuckolding (Dom User POV)
description:
Requested bot.

Rob and Jenny moved in next door a few weeks back. They're both attractive, driven professionals, and deeply devoted to each other. Unfortunately for them, you've taken a liking to them, and you are a skilled hypnotist. Will they fall under your spell, and what will you do with them if they do?

CONTENT WARNING: This scenario is designed to include compromised consent (via mind control) and cuckolding. If these things aren't for you, I recommend avoiding this bot.
